simplified_kindergarten: Greenland is a cold place. People live there and speak words.
simplified_primary_school: Greenland is a large country with its own people and culture. They speak the Greenlandic language and eat special local food. Many people there are called Inuit. Some people also speak Danish or live in Denmark.
simplified_secondary_school: Greenlandic refers to anything from Greenland, including its people, languages, and unique culture. Most residents are Greenlandic Inuit, who speak languages like Kalaallisut. The country has its own history involving Norse communities and specific traditions. You can also find unique animals there, such as Greenlandic sheep.

simplified_kindergarten: Many places have the name Andersonville. It is a name for towns.
simplified_primary_school: Andersonville is a name for many towns in the United States. There is also a famous book and a movie with this name. One place in Georgia was a site for soldiers during a war.
simplified_secondary_school: Andersonville is a name used for several locations across the United States and Canada, including a famous neighborhood in Chicago. It is most well-known for a Civil War prisoner camp in Georgia. This historical site inspired a Pulitzer Prize-winning novel and a film. Additionally, the name refers to a theological seminary and various historic districts.

original_text: Aarhus County or Århus County () is a former county of Denmark (Danish: amt) on the Jutland peninsula. It was created in 1970 by a merger of three counties: Århus, Randers and Skanderborg. The county was abolished effective 1 January 2007, when almost all of it merged into Region Midtjylland (i.e. Region Central Jutland). A very small portion was merged into Region Nordjylland (Region North Jutland). At the time of its abolishment, more than 20,000 people worked for the county. Municipalities (1970-2006) References Former counties of Denmark (1970–2006) Central Denmark Region Articles lacking sources from June 2009 All articles lacking sources
simplified_kindergarten: Aarhus was a place in Denmark. Many people lived and worked there.
simplified_primary_school: Aarhus County was a large area in Denmark. It started in 1970 when three smaller places joined together. Over 20,000 people worked for the county. In 2007, it closed and became part of a bigger region.
simplified_secondary_school: Aarhus County was a former administrative district located on the Jutland peninsula in Denmark. It was established in 1970 after three existing counties merged into one. When the county was abolished in 2007, most of its land became part of the Central Denmark Region. At that time, the county employed more than 20,000 people to manage its services.

( 1996 ) . we present our methods for estimating the numbers of galaxies and the number of solar luminosities to which the survey is sensitive , the supernova detection efficiency and hence the control time . we derive a rest - frame type ia supernova rate at @xmath0 of @xmath1 @xmath2 snu where the first uncertainty is statistical and the second includes systematic effects .
simplified_kindergarten: We found old stars exploding. They are very bright.
simplified_primary_school: Scientists found bright exploding stars far away in space. They used a big telescope to count them. They learned how often these stars explode. This helps us understand the sky better.
simplified_secondary_school: Scientists measured how often a specific type of star explodes in the distant universe. They used data from a large project to track these bright events. By looking at many galaxies, they calculated the rate of these explosions. Their results include a specific number and account for possible errors.

original_text: In telecommunication, the term bit-stream transmission has the following meanings: 1. In bit-oriented systems, the transmission of bit strings. 2. In character-oriented systems, the transmission of bit streams that represent characters. In bit-stream transmission, the bits usually occur at fixed time intervals, start and stop signals are not used, and the bit patterns follow each other in sequence without interruption.
simplified_kindergarten: Fast bits run in a line. They do not stop.
simplified_primary_school: Machines send bits in a long line. They move at a steady speed. The bits do not stop or take breaks. This helps messages travel fast.
simplified_secondary_school: Bit-stream transmission is the process of sending strings of data in a sequence. In this system, bits move at fixed time intervals without using start or stop signals. This allows information to flow continuously without any interruptions between the patterns. It can be used for simple data or to represent characters in different systems.

original_text: Neerabup National Park is a national park in the City of Wanneroo in Western Australia, situated approximately north of Perth. The park is found to the west of Wanneroo Road and is a long thin strip of bushland that is about in length. It contains no car parks and roads or any other facilities and attracts no entrance fee. The area protects part of an ancient Indigenous Australian migration route between Lake Joondalup and Loch McNess (in Yanchep National Park). This later became are well used stock route and then part of the Yaberoo Budjara Heritage Trail. The trail is based on the Yellalonga tribes movements between the lakes and highlights features of historical, aboriginal and natural significance. The park lies within the Northern Swan Coastal Plain Important Bird Area, so identified by BirdLife International because of its importance in supporting several thousand Short-billed Black Cockatoos during the non-breeding season. See also Protected areas of Western Australia References National parks of Western Australia Protected areas established in 1965 Important Bird Areas of Western Australia Neerabup, Western Australia
simplified_kindergarten: This is a big green park. Many birds live here.
simplified_primary_school: Neerabup National Park is a long forest in Western Australia. It has no roads or car parks inside. Long ago, people walked here to move between lakes. Today, many black cockatoos fly here to find food.
simplified_secondary_school: Neerabup National Park is a narrow strip of bushland located north of Perth. It is unique because it contains no roads or visitor facilities and is free to enter. The park protects an ancient migration route used by Indigenous Australians traveling between local lakes. This path is now part of the Yaberoo Budjara Heritage Trail, which highlights cultural and natural history. Additionally, the area is a vital habitat for thousands of Short-billed Black Cockatoos. BirdLife International recognizes the park as an important site for protecting these birds.

original_text: Hjo Municipality (Hjo kommun) is a municipality in Västra Götaland County in western Sweden. Its seat is located in the city of Hjo. The municipality was created in 1971, when the City of Hjo was amalgamated with a part of the rural municipality Värsås. In 1974 parts of Fröjered and Fågelås were added. Geography Geographically it is situated by the western shore of Lake Vättern. The large and fish-rich waters have been the main influence on the industry. The largest rivulet intersecting the municipality from Vättern is the Hjo River. Parts of it have been made a nature reserve. Partly this is due to the salmon (Salmo trutta) and the grayling (Thymallus thymallus) that occur natural in the rivulet, but have had hard times due to dams. References External links Hjo Municipality - Official site Three Wooden Towns - Requires some plugin Municipalities of Västra Götaland County Skaraborg
simplified_kindergarten: Hjo is a small town. It is by a lake.
simplified_primary_school: Hjo is a town in Sweden next to a big lake. Many people fish in the water. There is a river with pretty fish and a park. The town started over fifty years ago.
simplified_secondary_school: Hjo Municipality is located in western Sweden on the shores of Lake Vättern. The local economy has always relied on the lake because it is full of fish. The Hjo River flows through the area and includes a nature reserve to protect local wildlife. This reserve helps fish like salmon and grayling survive despite the presence of dams. The current municipality was formed in the 1970s by joining several smaller areas together.

original_text: It’s a special occasion – but our birthdays are not always that happy. The odds of dying on that day are higher than average, according to a study of millions of death records. The excesses of partying plus accidents while travelling to celebrations are risk factors, warned researchers. Accident: New research suggests the excesses of partying plus accidents while travelling to celebrations are risk factors on birthdays . Suicides triggered by the ‘birthday blues’ may also be to blame, said academics at Chicago University. Researcher Pablo Peña said the phenomenon could be due to people ‘deviating from their usual behaviour’ on their birthday. Details of the demise of more than 25million people over 14 years were examined in the study. The data was recorded in the Death Master File, a list of all deaths in the US which is made public to prevent fraud. Nearly 73,266 people died on their birthday, nearly 7 per cent more than would be expected, reported the journal Social Science & Medicine. Death: Nearly 73,266 people died on their birthday, nearly 7 per cent more than would be expected, reported the journal Social Science & Medicine .
simplified_kindergarten: Birthdays are fun days. Stay safe while you play.
simplified_primary_school: Birthdays are fun, but they can be dangerous too. Some people get hurt while traveling to parties. Others feel sad on their big day. A study shows more people die on their birthday than usual.
simplified_secondary_school: A study of millions of death records shows that people are more likely to die on their birthday. Researchers believe that traveling to parties and celebrating too much increase the risk of accidents. Some people also feel extra sadness on their birthday, which can lead to harm. Experts say this happens because people change their normal behavior during celebrations. Data from over 25 million people showed a seven percent increase in deaths on birthdays. These findings were published in a medical journal to help people stay safe during special events.

original_text: we study the continuous - variable quantum teleportation of states , statistical moments of observables , and scale parameters such as squeezing . we investigate the problem both in ideal and imperfect vaidman - braunstein - kimble protocol setups . we show how the teleportation fidelity is maximized and the difference between output and input variances is minimized by using suitably optimized entangled resources . specifically , we consider the teleportation of coherent squeezed states , exploiting squeezed bell states as entangled resources . this class of non - gaussian states , introduced in references @xcite , includes photon - added and photon - subtracted squeezed states as special cases . at variance with the case of entangled gaussian resources , the use of entangled non - gaussian squeezed bell resources allows one to choose different optimization procedures that lead to inequivalent results . performing two independent optimization procedures one can either maximize the state teleportation fidelity , or minimize the difference between input and output quadrature variances the two different procedures are compared depending on the degrees of displacement and squeezing of the input states and on the working conditions in ideal and non - ideal setups .
simplified_kindergarten: We send light like magic. It travels to a new place.
simplified_primary_school: Scientists are moving light energy from one place to another. They use special tools to keep the light's shape perfect. They found the best way to do this without any mistakes. This helps us share information very quickly and safely.
simplified_secondary_school: Researchers are studying how to teleport quantum states using different types of light. They tested a specific method called the Vaidman-Braunstein-Kimble protocol in both perfect and messy conditions. By using optimized resources, they can improve the accuracy of the teleported information. They specifically looked at non-Gaussian states, which include adding or removing photons from light. The study shows that you can choose to either make the copy more accurate or keep the energy levels stable. These two different methods were compared to see which works best under various real-world conditions.

original_text: The La Ferté-Alais Air Show is an annual meeting of aviation enthusiasts in La Ferté-Alais, France. It takes place during Pentecost at the Cerny airfield, which is owned and operated by the "Amicale Jean-Baptiste Salis" (AJ-BS). The airfield is also the site of a museum which sports an impressive number of pre-World War I up to present aircraft. The B-17 Flying Fortress The Pink Lady used in the motion picture Memphis Belle is a permanent project of the AJ-BS group. During the show, dozens of vintage aircraft are assembled from Europe and the US for display and flight demonstrations. The French air force usually demonstrates some new air capacity (paratroops, etc.) as well as overflight by the Patrouille de France, the French aerobatic team (similar to the Blue Angels, Thunderbirds in the US). Also, Airbus or other aircraft manufacturers will fly their latest commercial aircraft, such as the A-300 series of jetliners. References External links AJ-BS group official Site (french only) Air shows Aviation in France
simplified_kindergarten: Big planes fly in the sky. People watch them and smile.
simplified_primary_school: Every year, people in France watch a big air show. You can see old planes and fast jets fly high. There is also a museum with many cool aircraft. It is a fun day for families who love flying.
simplified_secondary_school: The La Ferté-Alais Air Show is an annual event in France for aviation fans. It features dozens of vintage aircraft from Europe and the United States. Visitors can explore a museum or watch flight demonstrations by the French air force. The show includes famous planes like the B-17 Flying Fortress and modern Airbus jetliners. The Patrouille de France aerobatic team also performs exciting stunts in the sky. This event takes place during Pentecost at the Cerny airfield.

simplified_kindergarten: Math can make pretty shapes. Some shapes look like stars.
simplified_primary_school: Scientists use special math patterns to draw shapes. These shapes have many dots. We can use math rules to find where the dots go.
simplified_secondary_school: Researchers studied special math patterns called polynomials to find new rules. They used these rules to explain the shapes formed by the roots. This helps us understand the regular patterns seen in computer models.

original_text: By . Ashley Clements . Follow @@Ashley_Clements . Chelsea assistant first-team coach Jose Morais has taken a one-year sabbatical in order to become the manager of Saudi Arabian side Al-Shabbab. Morais first joined Jose Mourinho at Inter Milan where he assisted in scouting and opposition analysis before following the now Chelsea boss to Real Madrid. The Blues have revealed that Morais's role as assistant first-team coach will be split between two different members of staff. Moving on: Chelsea coach Jose Morais (right) has taken a one-year sabbatical to manage Al-Shabbab . Head of analysis and opposition scouting James Melbourne will take over and report directly to Mourinho as he works closely with scouts Mick McGiven and Paul McGiven. Former Real Madrid staff member Carlos Lalin has also joined Mourinho's backroom from Real Madrid. Lalin will become the assistant first-team fitness coach and gym manager. Backroom: Jose Mourinho will now be joined by former Real Madrid coach Carlos Lalin .
simplified_kindergarten: A coach has a new job. He will help a new team.
simplified_primary_school: Jose Morais is leaving Chelsea to be a manager in Saudi Arabia. He worked with Jose Mourinho for a long time. Now, two other people will do his old job. A new fitness coach named Carlos Lalin is joining the team.
simplified_secondary_school: Chelsea assistant coach Jose Morais is taking a one-year break to manage Al-Shabbab in Saudi Arabia. He previously worked with Jose Mourinho at Inter Milan and Real Madrid. James Melbourne will now handle scouting and analysis duties for the team. Additionally, Carlos Lalin has joined the staff as a fitness coach and gym manager.

original_text: London (CNN) -- A single ticket holder won more than 160 million pounds ($255 million) in the British Euromillions draw Tuesday night, lottery operator Camelot said Wednesday. Lottery officials did not say if a winner has come forward. The winning numbers were 17, 19, 38, 42, 45 with Lucky Stars 09 and 10. If a single person won the 161,653,000 pound prize, he or she will instantly become about as rich as David and Victoria Beckham, and wealthier than Eric Clapton or Ringo Starr, according to the Sunday Times 2011 Rich List. CNN's Laura Perez Maestro contibuted to this report.
simplified_kindergarten: A person won a big prize. They have lots of money now.
simplified_primary_school: A lucky person won a lot of money in a game. They won over 160 million pounds on Tuesday. This person is now very rich. They have as much money as famous stars.
simplified_secondary_school: A single ticket holder won over 160 million pounds in the British Euromillions draw on Tuesday. Lottery officials have not yet confirmed if the winner claimed the prize. The winning numbers included 17, 19, 38, 42, and 45. This huge win makes the person as wealthy as famous celebrities like David Beckham. They are now even richer than musicians like Eric Clapton or Ringo Starr.

original_text: (CNN) -- A car bomb attack in Algeria has killed three people and wounded 23, the Algerian Press Service reported. An Algerian policeman stands in front of destroyed buildings in Thenia. The attack occurred Tuesday near an office housing judicial police in the city of Thenia, about 50 km (31 miles) east of the capital of Algiers, the agency said. The blast destroyed about 20 houses, and a commission has been appointed to look after the victims, the press agency said. Islamic extremists in Algeria and other North African countries have struck several times in recent years. An al Qaeda affiliate claimed responsibility last year for the deadliest attack in Algiers in 10 years, a bombing that destroyed the prime minister's headquarters and a police base, killing at least 24 people and wounding more than 220. Al Qaeda also took responsibility for a January 2 bombing that killed four and wounded 20 at a building housing security forces in Naciria, a city about 50 km (31 miles) east of Algiers. E-mail to a friend .
simplified_kindergarten: A bad bomb hurt people. Many houses broke down.
simplified_primary_school: A car bomb exploded in a city in Algeria. Three people died and many houses were destroyed. This happened near a police building on Tuesday. Some bad groups have caused other attacks there before.
simplified_secondary_school: A car bomb in the Algerian city of Thenia killed three people and injured twenty-three others on Tuesday. The explosion was powerful enough to destroy twenty houses near a police station. Officials have created a special team to help the victims of the blast. This attack is part of a series of bombings by extremist groups in North Africa. Last year, a group linked to al Qaeda claimed responsibility for a much larger attack in the capital city. Another similar bombing happened recently in a nearby town in January.

original_text: we present the final analysis of the european large area iso survey ( elais ) 15 @xmath0 m observations , carried out with the isocam instrument on board the infrared space observatory ( iso ) . the data reduction method , known as lari method , is based on a mathematical model of the detector s behaviour and was specifically designed for the detection of faint sources in iso - cam / phot data . the method is fully interactive and leads to very reliable and complete source lists . the resulting catalogue includes 1923 sources detected with @xmath1 in the flux range and over an area of 10.85 split into four fields , making it the largest non - serendipitous extragalactic source catalogue obtained to date from iso data . this paper presents the concepts underlying the data reduction method together with its latest enhancements . the data reduction process , the production and basic properties of the resulting catalogue are then discussed . [ firstpage ] infrared : galaxies galaxies : formation , evolution , active , starburst cosmology : observations methods : data analysis catalogues .
simplified_kindergarten: Stars shine far away. A giant camera takes photos.
simplified_primary_school: Scientists used a big space camera to find many far galaxies. They used a special computer tool to see very dim lights. This help them make a large list of 1,923 stars and galaxies. This list helps us learn about how our world began.
simplified_secondary_school: Researchers have finished a large study of the sky using a special infrared space telescope. They used a mathematical method called the Lari method to find very faint objects in space. This process is very reliable and helped them identify 1,923 different sources across four areas of the sky. This is currently the largest catalogue of its kind created from this space data. The paper explains how they processed the data and the properties of the galaxies they found. It provides important information about how galaxies form and change over time.

original_text: Los Angeles (CNN) -- Alex Trebek suffered a mild heart attack Saturday, but the "Jeopardy!" host should make a full recovery and return to the game show next month, a Sony Television spokeswoman said Sunday. Trebek, 71, checked into Cedars-Sinai Medical Center in Los Angeles Saturday and remained there Sunday, Sony's Paula Askanas said. "Trebek is in good spirits and is currently under observation and undergoing further testing," Askanas said. " He is expected to fully recover and be back at 'Jeopardy!' when production begins taping in July for the new season, the show's 29th." The show won the best game show Emmy at the Daytime Emmy awards Saturday.
simplified_kindergarten: A nice man is sick. He will feel better soon.
simplified_primary_school: Alex Trebek had a small heart attack on Saturday. He is in the hospital now. Doctors say he will feel better very soon. He will go back to his TV show in July.
simplified_secondary_school: Alex Trebek, the host of the show Jeopardy, suffered a mild heart attack on Saturday. The seventy-one-year-old is staying at a hospital in Los Angeles for testing. A spokeswoman said that he is in good spirits and should recover completely. He plans to return to the game show when filming begins next month. His show recently won an Emmy award while he was recovering.

original_text: Dison () is a municipality of Wallonia located in the province of Liège, Belgium. On January 1, 2006, Dison had a total population of 14,243. The total area is 14.01 km² which gives a population density of 1,017 inhabitants per km². The municipality consists of the following districts: Andrimont and Dison. References External links Municipalities of Liège (province)
simplified_kindergarten: Dison is a small town. Many people live there together.
simplified_primary_school: Dison is a town in Belgium. Over fourteen thousand people live there. It has two main parts called Andrimont and Dison. It is located in a place called Liège.
simplified_secondary_school: Dison is a Belgian municipality located within the province of Liège in Wallonia. In 2006, the town had a population of over 14,000 people living in a small area. This means the town is crowded because many people live on each kilometer of land. The municipality is made of two districts named Andrimont and Dison.

original_text: the physics of compact objects is one of the very actively developing branches of theoretical investigations , since the careful analysis of different models for the internal structure of these objects , their evolutionary characteristics and the comparison with modern observational data give access to discriminate among various speculations about the state of matter under extreme conditions . the lecture provides an overview to the problem of neutron star cooling evolution . we discuss the scheme and necessary inputs for neutron star cooling simulations from the background of a microscopic modeling in order to present the surface temperature - age characteristics of hybrid neutron stars including the determination of main regulators of the cooling process , the question of neutrino production and diffusion .
simplified_kindergarten: Stars get cold over time. We watch them change.
simplified_primary_school: Scientists study how small, heavy stars cool down. They use computers to see how the stars change as they get older. This helps us learn about space.
simplified_secondary_school: This lecture explores how neutron stars cool down over time. Scientists use models to study the internal structure of these dense objects and their temperature. By comparing these models to real data, they can understand how matter behaves in extreme conditions. We will also discuss how tiny particles called neutrinos help regulate the cooling process.

original_text: An Amazon Standard Identification Number (ASIN) is a 10-character alphanumeric unique identifier assigned by Amazon.com and its partners for product identification within the Amazon organization. They were originated in 1996 by Rebecca Allen, an Amazon software engineer, when it became clear that Amazon was going to sell products other than books. The 10-character format of the ASIN was adopted so that Amazon databases and software, which were designed to expect a 10-character International Standard Book Number (ISBN) field, would not have to be changed to accommodate the new identification format. Usage and structure Each product sold on Amazon.com is given a unique ASIN. For books with a 10-digit International Standard Book Number (ISBN), the ASIN and the ISBN are the same. The Kindle edition of a book will not use its ISBN as the ASIN, although the electronic version of a book may have its own ISBN. The ASIN forms part of the URL of a product detail page on Amazon's website. References ASIN Book terminology Identifiers ja:Amazon.com#ASIN
simplified_kindergarten: Every toy has a special name. Amazon uses numbers to find them.
simplified_primary_school: Amazon gives every item a special code called an ASIN. This code has ten letters and numbers. It helps the computer find the right product quickly. Books often use their own special numbers for this code.
simplified_secondary_school: An ASIN is a ten-character code that Amazon uses to identify every product. A software engineer created this system in 1996 when Amazon started selling more than books. They chose ten characters so the existing computer databases would not need expensive updates. You can often find this unique code within the website link for a product.

original_text: in this paper , we explore a connection between binary hierarchical models , their marginal polytopes and codeword polytopes , the convex hulls of linear codes . the class of linear codes that are realizable by hierarchical models is determined . we classify all full dimensional polytopes with the property that their vertices form a linear code and give an algorithm that determines them .
simplified_kindergarten: We look at shapes. We use math to build them.
simplified_primary_school: We study how math creates different shapes. We found a way to link groups of numbers to these shapes. We also made a new tool to find them.
simplified_secondary_school: This paper examines the link between hierarchical models and the shapes created by linear codes. We identified which codes work with these models. Our team classified specific shapes and created an algorithm to help identify them.

simplified_secondary_school: A Clifford algebra and a Clifford cogebra can combine to form a biconvolution. We found that this system has a special balance called an antipode under certain conditions. If it has an antipode, it is known as a Clifford Hopf gebra.

original_text: Gehry Tower is a nine-story building constructed by architect Frank Gehry; it is located at the Steintor, Goethestraße 13a, in Hanover, Germany. The building was commissioned by the city-owned Hanover Transport Services (üstra), for whom Gehry also designed a bus stop in the city. Constructed of stainless steel, the tower is memorable for the noticeable twist in its outer façade on a ferroconcrete core, making optimal use of the relatively small piece of ground on which it is located. Like many of Gehry's buildings, the tower was created with the most modern technology available at the time. Gehry's office first created a 1:100 model, which was then scanned and imported into CAD software to be able to compute the dimensions for the individual parts, all of which vary in size and shape. Construction began in 1999, cost 8.5 million Deutsche Mark, and the building officially opened 28 June 2001. External links Frank Gehry buildings Buildings and structures completed in 2001 Buildings and structures in Hanover Twisted buildings and structures 2001 establishments in Germany
simplified_kindergarten: Look at the shiny silver tower. It has a funny twist!
simplified_primary_school: The Gehry Tower is a tall silver building in Germany. It looks twisted because the walls curve around the middle. A famous man built it using a small piece of land. It opened in 2001 and cost a lot of money.
simplified_secondary_school: The Gehry Tower is a unique nine-story building located in Hanover, Germany. Architect Frank Gehry designed it with a noticeable twist in its stainless steel exterior. This unusual shape allowed the building to fit perfectly on a small plot of land. To create the design, his team used advanced computer software to calculate the different sizes of each part. Construction finished in 2001 and cost 8.5 million Deutsche Mark. The project was originally started for the city's transport service.

original_text: Seoul, South Korea (CNN) -- Samsung Electronics said Friday it is expecting weaker third quarter sales as demand for flat screen televisions and computer chips falls. The South Korean technology giant forecasts an operating profit of 3.75 trillion won ($3.5 billion), down 13% from a year earlier. Profits are expected to rise though from the previous quarter by 12%. Analysts say Samsung's handset sales are helping weaknesses in other businesses. "Semi conductors are still strong and even if they don't make as much profit, it's not because they're less competitive, it's because the semiconductor market as a whole went down. As for smart phones, they are becoming comparable with Apple, they haven't surpassed Apple yet but they are catching up very fast," Lee Sun Tae of Meritz Securities in Seoul said. Experts also say the strengthening US dollar against the Korean won helps exports and the bottom line. Lee estimates a small increase in the dollar's strength of less than one cent could result in an extra $250,000 profit for Samsung. Lee believes the US dollar will continue to gain strength for the rest of this year.
simplified_kindergarten: Samsung makes phones and TVs. They are selling fewer things now.
simplified_primary_school: Samsung is selling fewer TVs and computer parts lately. Their total profit went down from last year. However, many people are still buying their new phones. A strong US dollar also helps the company earn more money.
simplified_secondary_school: Samsung expects lower sales because fewer people are buying flat screen televisions and computer chips. Their profit dropped compared to last year, but it grew since the last quarter. Experts say that Samsung’s popular smartphones are helping the company stay successful. While the chip market is currently weak, Samsung remains very competitive against rivals like Apple. Additionally, the rising value of the US dollar helps increase the company's profits from exports.

original_text: (CNN) -- Authorities will resume their search Monday morning for the bodies of four men who are believed to have drowned in southeastern Idaho after one of them fell overboard and three others went missing trying to rescue him, the Power County Sheriff's Department said. "It is not confirmed they are deceased at this time -- presumption that they are -- but we cannot confirm any deaths at this time or drowning," said Cpl. Leilani Morgan. The incident took place Sunday at the American Falls Reservoir, about 180 miles east-southeast of Boise. Five children -- all under the age of nine -- also were on the boat and have been rescued by authorities, according to the sheriff's department. CNNRadio's Matt Cherry contributed to this report .
simplified_kindergarten: A boat was on the water. Some men got lost.
simplified_primary_school: Four men are missing in a big lake in Idaho. One man fell out of a boat. Three friends tried to help him but they got lost too. Police saved five children from the boat.
simplified_secondary_school: Police in Idaho are searching for four men who disappeared at the American Falls Reservoir on Sunday. One man fell overboard, and the others went missing while attempting to rescue him. Although officials believe the men drowned, they have not confirmed any deaths yet. Fortunately, authorities rescued five young children who were also on the boat.

original_text: Brezina can refer to: Places Brezina (village), a village in Trebišov district, Slovakia Brézina, a municipality or commune in El Bayadh province, Algeria People Aristides Brezina (1848-1909), an Austrian mineralogist and meteoriticist Greg Brezina (born 1946), a former professional American football player Jiri Brezina (born 1933), German scientist Thomas Brezina (born 1963), an Austrian author See also Březina (disambiguation) Berezina (disambiguation) eo:Brezina

Famous individuals named Brezina include an Austrian scientist and an American football player. You might also find similar names like Březina or Berezina in other records.

Other men with this name include English cricketers, various architects, and a member of Parliament. Some were inventors or military generals, and the name even appears as a character in a Sherlock Holmes story.

original_text: in a remarkable paper from 1852 , gotthilf heinrich ludwig hagen measured and explained two fundamental aspects of granular matter : the first effect is the saturation of pressure with depth in a static granular system confined by silo walls generally known as the _ janssen effect_. the second part of his paper describes the dynamics observed during the flow out of the container today often called the _ beverloo law _ and forms the foundation of the _ hourglass theory_. the following is a translation of the original german paper from 1852 .

He also described how these materials flow out, which helped create the theory behind how hourglasses work.

original_text: Profondeville (; ) is a municipality of Wallonia located in the province of Namur, Belgium. On January 1, 2016, Profondeville had a total population of 12,117. The total area of the municipality is and the population density is 240.70 inhabitants per km². The original municipality of Profondeville was expanded, during the post-1974 fusion of the Belgian municipalities, with the addition of the ancienne communes of Arbre, Bois-de-Villers, Lesve, Lustin, Rivière and the Lakisse area from the southeast of the newly-adjoining municipality of Floreffe. Gallery Twin towns Roquebrune-Cap-Martin, France See also List of protected heritage sites in Profondeville References External links Official website Municipalities of Namur (province)
simplified_kindergarten: This is a town in Belgium. Many people live here.

simplified_secondary_school: Profondeville is a Belgian municipality located in the province of Namur. In 2016, the town had a population of over twelve thousand residents. The area grew larger when several smaller villages joined together after 1974. It is now a diverse community that shares a special connection with a town in France.

original_text: QPR are taking a look at Argentine defender Pablo Alvarez ahead of a possible move. The 30-year-old free agent is training with Rangers in the hope of securing a contract over the coming days. Alvarez was released by Catania in the summer and has been talking to a number of clubs around Europe. Pablo Alvarez (left) is training with QPR after leaving Catania on a free transfer in the summer . Argetine defender Alvarez spent six years at Catania before leaving the Italian outfit in the summer . Queens Park Rangers boss Harry Redknapp is keen on bolstering his defensive options . Boca Juniors: 2003-05 . Estudiantes: 2005-07 . Catania: 2008-14 . Rosario Central (loan): 2009 . Zaragoza (loan): 2012 . Formerly of Boca Juniors and Estudiantes, Alvarez can play in both full back positions and as a defensive midfielder. QPR manager Harry Redknapp will be hoping to bolster his defensive options over the next couple of months as his side have leaked the most amount of goals in the Premier League. Alvarez's ability to play in a number of different roles will prove to be an added bonus to Redknapp.
simplified_kindergarten: The soccer team needs help. A new player is practicing.

The thirty-year-old is a free agent who previously played for Catania in Italy. Manager Harry Redknapp wants to improve his defense because the team has conceded many goals this season. Alvarez is a useful player because he can play as a defender or a midfielder. He has also played for teams like Boca Juniors and Zaragoza during his long career.

original_text: Leeds United captain Stephen Warnock is poised to join Derby County, possibly as early as Monday. Steve McClaren has been in pursuit of a left back to support Craig Forsyth and it is believed Warnock could be allowed to leave Elland Road on a free transfer despite playing 22 times for the club this term. Warnock, 33, is one of the highest earners at Leeds and his deal, signed in January 2013, expires at the end of this season. Leeds United captain Stephen Warnock is set to sign for promotion hopefuls Derby County this week . Derby boss Steve McClaren is also close to bringing SD Eibar centre-back Raul Albentosa to the club . McClaren has already secured Darren Bent on loan from Aston Villa and is close to bringing centre-back Raul Albentosa to Derby in a £470,000 deal. 'He (Albentosa) is someone we have pursued and we are trying to do a deal,' said McClaren. 'We are looking at him and we are interested but I don’t know where we are at the present moment with it.’ It looks set to be a busy January for McClaren (right) who has already signed Darren Bent (left) on loan .
simplified_kindergarten: The football player will move. He will join a new team.
simplified_primary_school: Stephen Warnock is a football leader. He is moving to a new team called Derby County. His old team will let him go for free. The manager also wants to buy other good players this month.
simplified_secondary_school: Leeds United captain Stephen Warnock is expected to join Derby County very soon. Although he played many games this season, Leeds may let him leave for free because his contract ends soon. Manager Steve McClaren wants Warnock to help improve his team's defense. The club is also working on a deal for Spanish defender Raul Albentosa. This follows the recent arrival of striker Darren Bent on loan from Aston Villa.

original_text: Evagrius (in Greek: Ευάγριος; died c. 380) was the archbishop of Constantinople for a brief period in 370, and possibly in 380. In 370, the Arians elected Demophilus to fill the bishopric vacancy after the death of Eudoxius of Antioch. The Nicene Christians and the deposed bishop of Antioch Eustathius chose Evagrius for that see; but a few months later he was banished by the emperor Valens, and remained in exile until his death. Some sources claim that he was elected a second time in 379 or 380, after the expulsion of Demophilus by emperor Theodosius I. References 380 deaths 4th-century Archbishops of Constantinople Opponents of Arianism 4th-century Romans Year of birth unknown
simplified_kindergarten: A man named Evagrius was a leader. He had to go away.
simplified_primary_school: Evagrius was an important leader in a big city. Some people chose him to be a bishop. A king was angry and sent him away for years. He stayed away until he died.
simplified_secondary_school: Evagrius served as the archbishop of Constantinople during a time of great religious conflict. In 370, one group chose Demophilus while another group elected Evagrius instead. However, Emperor Valens soon banished Evagrius, forcing him to live in exile for the rest of his life. Some historians believe he was elected again in 380 after a different emperor changed the laws.

simplified_secondary_school: Hulk is a popular Marvel Comics superhero, but the name refers to many other things. It is a nickname for several famous athletes, including football players and a race car driver. The name also describes a type of ship that cannot sail. Additionally, Hulk is the title of a 2003 movie and various video games.

original_text: In the Integrated Services Digital Network (ISDN), a high-speed communication channel comprising multiple aggregated low-speed channels to accommodate bandwidth-intensive applications such as file transfer, videoconferencing, and high-quality audio. An H channel is formed of multiple bearer B channels bonded together in a primary rate access (PRA) or primary rate interface (PRI) frame in support of applications with bandwidth requirements that exceed the B channel rate of 64 kbit/s. The channels, once bonded, remain so end-to-end, from transmitter to receiver, through the ISDN network. The feature is known variously as multirate ISDN, Nx64, channel aggregation, and bonding. H channels are implemented as: H0 = 384 kbit/s(6 B channels) H10 = 1472 kbit/s(23 B channels) H11 = 1536 kbit/s(24 B channels) H12 = 1920 kbit/s(30 B channels) – International (E-carrier) only. See also D channel B channel Integrated Services Digital Network
simplified_kindergarten: Small paths join to make a big road. Big roads move things fast.
simplified_primary_school: ISDN joins many small paths together to make one big path. This helps people send big files and videos quickly. The small paths stay joined until the message arrives. This is called bonding.
simplified_secondary_school: An H channel is a high-speed path created by joining multiple smaller B channels together. This process, known as bonding, provides more bandwidth for demanding tasks like video calls. The channels stay connected across the network from the sender to the receiver. Different types of H channels exist depending on how many paths are combined.

They discovered that superconductivity decreases as the films get thinner because of surface boundaries. The study showed higher temperature limits than older research. This improvement is likely because these specific samples were much cleaner than those used before.

simplified_kindergarten: Tiny bits of light crash together. They make new small friends.
simplified_primary_school: Scientists study what happens when tiny parts of light hit each other. These hits create new pairs of particles. They use math to count all the small changes. This helps them understand how light works.
simplified_secondary_school: This text explores how particles change when electrons and positrons crash into each other. Researchers focused on the third order of these complex corrections. They studied how both light and pairs of particles are created at the same time. The team used special math tools to make their calculations more accurate. They also estimated the small errors that might happen in their descriptions. This work helps us understand the rules of quantum physics better.

original_text: the very short and bright flare of 3c 279 detected with _ fermi_-lat in 2013 december is tested by a model with stochastic electron acceleration by turbulences . our time - dependent simulation shows that the very hard spectrum and asymmetric light curve are successfully reproduced by changing only the magnetic field from the value in the steady period . the maximum energy of electrons drastically grows with the decrease of the magnetic field , which yields a hard photon spectrum as observed . rapid cooling due to the inverse - compton scattering with the external photons reproduces the decaying feature of the light curve . the inferred energy density of the magnetic field is much less than the electron and photon energy densities . the low magnetic field and short variability timescale are unfavorable for the jet acceleration model from the gradual poynting flux dissipation .
simplified_kindergarten: A bright light flashed far away. It was very fast.
simplified_primary_school: Scientists saw a very bright flash in space. A weak magnetic field made the light look blue and strong. The light changed very quickly. It faded fast because the space particles cooled down.
simplified_secondary_school: In December 2013, scientists detected a very short and bright flare from 3c 279. They used a model to show how moving electrons created this light. The flare happened because the magnetic field became much weaker than normal. This change allowed particles to reach higher energy and create a hard spectrum. The light faded quickly because the particles lost heat through a process called scattering. This discovery suggests that magnetic fields play a smaller role in these jets than expected.

original_text: Chanidae is a family of fishes which has a number of fossil genera and one monotypic extant genus which contains the milkfish (Chanos chanos). Taxonomy The family Chanidae is subdivided into two subfamilies, the Rubiesichthyinae, which comprises the extinct genera †Gordichthys, †Nanaichthys and †Rubiesichthys from the early Cretaceous, and the Chaninae which comprises the sole extant genus Chanos and the extinct genera †Dastilbe, †Parachanos and †Tharrhias, also from the early Cretacaeous. simplified_kindergarten: Meet the milkfish. It has many old cousins.
simplified_primary_school: Milkfish belong to a family of fish called Chanidae. Most of their relatives lived a long time ago. Today, only one type of milkfish is still alive. Scientists found many fossils from this fish group.
simplified_secondary_school: The Chanidae family includes many extinct groups and one living species known as the milkfish. This family is divided into two subfamilies that first appeared during the early Cretaceous period. While many genera like Dastilbe are now fossils, the genus Chanos still exists today. Researchers have identified these fish across many geological time periods.

original_text: Former US Amateur champion Matt Fitzpatrick has secured his playing privileges for the European Tour next season at the age of just 20 following a tense final day at the Qualifying School in Spain. The Sheffield youngster birdied three of the last six holes to finish tied 10th. The Q-School was won by Mikko Korhonen from Finland, while no fewer than seven more Englishman — Matt Ford, John Parry, Richard McEvoy, Chris Lloyd, Tom Murray, Paul Maddy and Chris Paisley — gained their cards. Matt Fitzpatrick stands with the Havemeyer trophy after winning the 2013 US Amateur Championship .
simplified_kindergarten: A young boy won a game. He is very happy.
simplified_primary_school: Matt is twenty years old and plays golf very well. He played a big game in Spain and won a spot. Seven other men from England also won their places. Matt previously won a famous trophy in America.
simplified_secondary_school: At twenty years old, Matt Fitzpatrick has earned his place on the European Tour. He finished in tenth place after a difficult final day in Spain. Mikko Korhonen won the event, but seven other English players also qualified. This success follows Matt's earlier victory at the US Amateur Championship.

original_text: (CNN) -- Rescue workers have pulled a body from underneath the rubble of a collapsed apartment building in Cologne, Germany, police spokeswoman Astrid Gelss told CNN. The remains of Cologne's archive building following the collapse on Tuesday afternoon. The apartment building collapsed together with two other buildings on March 3. Initially as many as nine people were reported missing, but after seven of them reported to the authorities that they were safe, search and rescue efforts focused on finding the two remaining missing men. Rescue workers found the body at about 2 a.m. Sunday morning (8 p.m. ET Saturday). It has not been identified. The search for the second missing person is still ongoing, Gelss said. It is still not clear what caused the collapse of the building which contained the city's historical archives, bringing down parts of the two nearby structures. CNN's Per Nyberg contributed to this report.
simplified_kindergarten: A big house fell down. Kind people look for help.
simplified_primary_school: A building fell down in Germany. Workers found one person in the broken stone. They are still looking for one more person. Nobody knows why the building fell.
simplified_secondary_school: Rescue workers in Germany found a body after an apartment building collapsed. Initially, nine people were missing, but seven were later found safe. The building also held the city's historical archives and damaged two nearby structures. Police are still searching for one more missing person. It is not yet clear why the buildings fell down on Tuesday.

original_text: A mafic (portmanteau of "magnesium" and "ferric") mineral or rock is a silicate mineral or igneous rock rich in magnesium and iron. Most mafic minerals are dark in color, and common rock-forming mafic minerals include olivine, pyroxene, amphibole, and biotite. Common mafic rocks include basalt, diabase and gabbro. Mafic rocks often also contain calcium-rich varieties of plagioclase feldspar. Mafic materials can also be described as ferromagnesian. Chemically, mafic rocks are enriched in iron, magnesium and calcium and typically dark in color. In contrast, the felsic rocks are typically light in color and enriched in aluminium and silicon along with potassium and sodium. The mafic rocks also typically have a higher density than felsic rocks. The term roughly corresponds to the older basic rock class. Mafic lava, before cooling, has a low viscosity, in comparison with felsic lava, due to the lower silica content in mafic magma. Water and other volatiles can more easily and gradually escape from mafic lava. As a result, eruptions of volcanoes made of mafic lavas are less explosively violent than felsic-lava eruptions. See also QAPF diagram List of minerals List of rock types Bowen's reaction series References Mineralogy Igneous petrology
simplified_kindergarten: Some rocks are dark and heavy. They have iron inside.
simplified_primary_school: Mafic rocks are dark and heavy because they have iron and magnesium. They come from runny lava that flows easily. These rocks do not usually cause big, scary explosions. Common types of these dark rocks are basalt and gabbro.
simplified_secondary_school: Mafic rocks are igneous rocks that are rich in magnesium and iron. These minerals are usually dark in color and have a higher density than light-colored felsic rocks. Common examples of mafic rocks include basalt and gabbro. Because they have less silica, mafic lava is thin and flows more easily than felsic lava. This low viscosity allows gas to escape, making their volcanic eruptions less violent and explosive.

original_text: a version of scattering theory that was developed many years ago to treat nuclear scattering processes , has provided a powerful tool to study universality in scattering processes involving open quantum systems with underlying classically chaotic dynamics . recently , it has been used to make random matrix theory predictions concerning the statistical properties of scattering resonances in mesoscopic electron waveguides and electromagnetic waveguides . we provide a simple derivation of this scattering theory and we compare its predictions to those obtained from an exactly solvable scattering model ; and we use it to study the scattering of a particle wave from a random potential . this method may prove useful in distinguishing the effects of chaos from the effects of disorder in real scattering processes .

We also used it to see how waves move through random areas. This method helps us see the difference between chaotic movement and simple disorder.

original_text: Tombaatar is a mammal genus that existed during the Mongolian Upper Cretaceous period. It co-existed with some of the late dinosaurs. This animal was a member of the extinct order Multituberculata, within the suborder Cimolodonta and family Djadochtatheriidae. The genus Tombaatar was named by Rougier G.W., Novacek M. and Dashzeveg D. in 1997. The species Tombaatar sabuli is known from remains found in the Upper Cretaceous Djadokhta Formation of Ukhaa Tolgod, Mongolia. Tombaatar was a relatively large multituberculate. The skull is about 6 cm in length. References Rougier, Novacek & Dashzeveg (1997), "A new multituberculate from the late Cretaceous locality Ukhaa Tolgod, Mongolia: Considerations on multituberculate interrelationships", American Museum Novitates 3191, p. 1-26. Kielan-Jaworowska, Z. & Hurum, J.H. (2001), "Phylogeny and Systematics of multituberculate mammals", Paleontology 44, p. 389-429. Much of this information has been derived from Mesozoic Mammals: Djadochtatherioidea, an Internet directory. Cimolodonts Cretaceous mammals Extinct mammals of Asia Prehistoric mammal genera
simplified_kindergarten: A big fuzzy animal lived long ago. It lived with the dinosaurs.
simplified_primary_school: Tombaatar was a mammal that lived a very long time ago. It lived in Mongolia at the same time as dinosaurs. This animal was quite large and had a small skull. Scientists found its old bones in the desert sand.
simplified_secondary_school: Tombaatar is an extinct genus of mammal that lived in Mongolia during the Late Cretaceous period. It co-existed with famous dinosaurs and belonged to a group called multituberculates. Researchers discovered its fossilized remains in the Djadokhta Formation in 1997. This creature was relatively large for its group, with a skull measuring about six centimeters long. Most of our knowledge comes from fossils found at the Ukhaa Tolgod site.

original_text: Nicolas Anelka has been cleared to play for Mumbai City in Sunday's opening game of the Indian Super League. The former West Bromwich striker was banned for five games by the FA for his ‘quenelle’ gesture in December that was deemed anti-Semitic. But the Indians have allowed him to face Atletico de Kolkata after writing to FIFA for guidance but receiving no response. Nicolas Anelka, in training for Mumbai City, looks set to make his Indian Super League debut on Sunday . Anelka's 'quenelle' gesture caused controversy and saw the then-West Brom striker banned for five games . Kushal Das, general secretary of AIFF, said: ‘We asked FIFA about his ban, but since we have not heard, he can play.’ Initially the ex-Liverpool, Arsenal and Manchester City forward saw his ban cut from five games to three. The 35-year-old protested his innocence claiming it was merely an appreciation of French comedian Dieudonne M'bala M'bala who used the expression in his shows. On arriving as one of Mumbai's marquee players, the FA and had asked FIFA and the Indian Federation to uphold the ban. The former France international is a marquee player for Mumbai City under head coach Peter Reid .
simplified_kindergarten: The soccer player can play. He is very happy today.
simplified_primary_school: Nicolas Anelka can play soccer in India this Sunday. He was in trouble for a bad sign he made before. His new team asked for help but got no answer. Now he is ready to play his first big game.
simplified_secondary_school: Nicolas Anelka is cleared to play for Mumbai City in the Indian Super League this Sunday. He previously received a five-game ban for making a controversial gesture while playing in England. Indian football officials contacted FIFA for guidance regarding the ban but received no response. Because they heard nothing back, they decided to let the former French international join the game. Anelka claimed his actions were misunderstood and were meant to honor a French comedian. He is now a star player for Mumbai under coach Peter Reid.

original_text: (CNN) -- Tenants of apartments in Pacifica, California, were under evacuation Thursday after erosion threatened the cliff on which their building sits, a city official said. Authorities have been watching the seaside building for years and were waiting for the erosion to reach a 12-foot safety zone behind it, said Doug Rider, a building official for Pacifica. The problem has reached that zone, he said, so officials notified the building's management and tenants began evacuating. The building is stable, so tenants are able to remove belongings from the apartments, Rider said. Police, fire and other local authorities are assisting residents, along with the city's Building Department, he said. All residents of the 12-unit building must be out by 5 p.m. PT Thursday, he told CNN affiliate KGO-TV in San Francisco, California. KGO reported a large chunk of land fell from the cliff into the Pacific Ocean about 5:30 a.m. PT Thursday. Two nearby buildings also face questions about their structural reliability but are not being evacuated, the station reported. Pacifica is about 15 miles southwest of San Francisco. CNN's Sara Pratley contributed to this report.
simplified_kindergarten: The dirt near the house fell. People must move to be safe.
simplified_primary_school: A cliff in California is falling into the ocean. People living in a building there must leave today. They are taking their things to a safe place. Police and firemen are helping the families move.
simplified_secondary_school: People living in an apartment building in Pacifica, California, had to leave their homes on Thursday. The cliff underneath the building is washing away into the ocean. Officials ordered the evacuation because the erosion reached a dangerous safety zone. Residents were allowed to remove their belongings because the building is still stable for now. Local authorities are helping everyone move out before the evening deadline. Two other nearby buildings are also being watched for safety concerns.

original_text: Tartar sauce (French: sauce tartare; spelled tartare sauce in the UK, Ireland, New Zealand, Australia, Fiji, India, Pakistan, South Africa, and other parts of the Commonwealth) is a condiment made of mayonnaise, chopped pickles, capers and herbs such as tarragon and dill. Tartar sauce can also be enhanced with the addition of other varieties of herbs, lemon juice, or olives. It is most often served as a condiment with seafood dishes such as fried fish and fried oysters. Composition Tartar sauce is based on either mayonnaise (egg yolk, mustard or vinegar, bitartrate, oil) or aioli (olive oil, garlic), with certain other ingredients added. In the UK, recipes typically add to the base capers, gherkins, lemon juice, and dill. US recipes may include chopped dill pickles, onions (or chives), and fresh parsley. Chopped hard-boiled eggs or olives are sometimes added, as may be Dijon mustard and cocktail onions. Paul Bocuse described sauce tartare explicitly as a sauce remoulade, See also List of common dips Remoulade Steak tartare Tarator References External links An explanation of the name's origin, from The Straight Dope Tartar sauce and steak A definition at Allrecipes.com Sauces Mayonnaise Tatar cuisine French cuisine
simplified_kindergarten: This is a white sauce. It tastes good with fish.
simplified_primary_school: Tartar sauce is a creamy sauce for seafood. It is made with mayonnaise and small pickles. Many people eat it with fried fish. It often has lemon and herbs too.
simplified_secondary_school: Tartar sauce is a popular condiment usually served with seafood like fried fish or oysters. It is made from a base of mayonnaise or aioli mixed with chopped pickles and capers. Different countries use various herbs, such as dill or parsley, to add flavor. Some recipes also include lemon juice, onions, or hard-boiled eggs to make the sauce more delicious.

original_text: (CNN)Eight crew members are missing after a cargo vessel overturned off the coast of Scotland, the Royal National Lifeboat Institution said late Saturday. The search for the crew was suspended Sunday night with no sign of them, the Maritime & Coastguard Agency said. A search operation that included a helicopter, coast guard rescue teams and a fixed-wing aircraft was unsuccessful, the agency said. The coast guard in Shetland was notified at 2:30 p.m. that the hull of the Cemfjord was found 11 miles east of Pentland Skerries, the RNLI said. Photographs showed the vessel in a vertical position, one end jutting from the water. Meanwhile, 25 crew members were airlifted from a boat that ran aground off the coast of southern England, below Southampton, the Maritime & Coastguard Agency reported. Helicopters lifted the crew from the car carrier, which listed dramatically to one side. The ship ran aground on Bramble Bank near the Isle of Wight.
simplified_kindergarten: A big boat tipped over. People are looking for the crew.
simplified_primary_school: A cargo ship turned over near Scotland. Eight crew members are missing after a long search. Another boat got stuck near England. Helicopters rescued those twenty-five people safely.
simplified_secondary_school: Eight crew members are missing after their cargo ship overturned near the Scottish coast. Rescue teams used helicopters and planes, but they could not find the men. Meanwhile, a different ship carrying cars ran aground in southern England. Emergency crews successfully airlifted twenty-five people from that vessel before it tipped over too far.

original_text: the evolving galaxy is considered as a system of baryonic fragments embedded into the static dark nonbaryonic ( dh ) and baryonic ( bh ) halo and subjected to gravitational and viscous interactions . although the chemical evolution of each separate fragment is treated in the frame of one zone close box model with instantaneous recycling , its star formation ( sf ) activity is a function of mean local gas density and , therefore , is strongly influenced by other interacting fragments . in spite of its simplicity this model provides a realistic description of the process of galaxy formation and evolution over the hubble timescale .

simplified_secondary_school: A galaxy is a system of fragments inside a large halo of dark matter. These parts interact through gravity and friction as they move. While each part changes on its own, star formation depends on the gas density nearby. This means that nearby fragments strongly influence how stars are born. This model provides a realistic way to describe how galaxies have evolved over billions of years.

original_text: to examine a recently proposed hypothesis that silicon nanoparticles are the source of extended red emission ( ere ) in the interstellar medium , we performed a detailed modeling of the mean galactic extinction in the presence of silicon nanoparticles . for this goal we used the appropriate optical constants of nanosized si , essentially different from those of bulk si due to quantum confinement . it was found that a dust mixture of silicon nanoparticles , bare graphite grains , silicate core - organic refractory mantle grains and three - layer silicate - water ice - organic refractory grains works well in explaining the extinction and , in addition , results in the acceptable fractions of uv / visible photons absorbed by silicon nanoparticles : 0.0710.081 . since these fractions barely agree with the fraction of uv / visible photons needed to excite the observed ere , we conclude that the intrinsic photon conversion efficiency of the photoluminescence by silicon nanoparticles must be near 100% , if they are the source of the ere .

The study found that these particles can explain how light travels through space dust. However, the particles must be extremely efficient at changing light into a red glow. If this theory is right, the particles must convert nearly all energy into light.

original_text: In telecommunication, equivalent pulse code modulation (PCM) noise is the amount of noise power on a frequency-division multiplexing (FDM) or wire communication channel necessary to approximate the same judgment of speech quality created by quantization noise in a PCM channel. Note 1: The speech quality judgment is based on comparative tests. Note 2: Generally, 33.5 dBrnC ±2.5 dB is considered the approximate equivalent PCM noise of a 7-bit PCM system. References Multiplexing Noise (electronics)
simplified_kindergarten: Phones make a little sound. It sounds like a soft hum.
simplified_primary_school: Phones can make a buzzing sound called noise. We compare this sound to help make calls clear. We use tests to see how good the voices sound.
simplified_secondary_school: Equivalent PCM noise measures how much static is needed to match the sound quality of a digital phone system. Experts use comparative tests to judge the quality of speech on these channels. For a 7-bit system, the noise level is usually around 33.5 dBrnC. This helps engineers understand how much noise affects a person's ability to hear clearly.

original_text: was a Japanese author associated with the Japanese proletarian literature movement. He spent time in jail due to his involvement with the labor movement, but later turned away from Marxism and became an enthusiastic supporter of Japanese imperialism. original_text: integral field spectroscopy ( ifs ) provides a spectrum simultaneously for each spatial sample of an extended , two - dimensional field . it consists of an integral field unit ( ifu ) which slices and re - arranges the initial field along the entrance slit of a spectrograph . this article presents an original design of ifu based on the advanced image slicer concept @xcite . to reduce optical aberrations , pupil and slit mirrors are disposed in a fan - shaped configuration that means that angles between incident and reflected beams on each elements are minimized . the fan - shaped image slicer improves image quality in terms of wavefront error by a factor 2 comparing with classical image slicer and , furthermore it guaranties a negligible level of differential aberration in the field . as an exemple , we are presenting the design lam used for its proposal at the nirspec / ifu invitation of tender .

simplified_secondary_school: Integral field spectroscopy allows scientists to gather data from an entire area at once. A special unit slices the image and organizes it for a spectrograph. This new design uses a fan-shaped layout for the mirrors. This layout reduces mistakes in the light and improves the image quality significantly. The new method is twice as good as older designs. It ensures that the images stay sharp across the whole field of view.

original_text: By . Simon Jones . Sunderland are targeting a move for Jack Rodwell as the Manchester City midfielder goes in search of first team football. The 23-year-old has spent two seasons at the club, but he's failed to make much of an impact under two managers at the Etihad, making just 26 appearances in all competitions and scoring twice in the process. Rodwell was bought from Everton by Roberto Mancini for an initial fee of £12million in 2012, but was held back by a series of injuries and managed just 11 Premier League appearances. Wanted: Jack Rodwell is being chased by Sunderland . Rare outing: Rodwell shakes hands with Vincent Kompany following a League Cup tie with Leicester . And his fortunes did not improve at all last season, with Manuel Pellegrini giving him just 10 games in all competitions. Rodwell also has three caps for England, but only one of them has come whilst he has been in Manchester - a substitute cameo during a 2-2 draw against Brazil at the Maracana last June. He is now being chased by Sunderland, who are attempting to add to their squad following their dramatic Premier League survival last season.
simplified_kindergarten: The boy plays soccer. He wants a new team.
simplified_primary_school: Jack Rodwell wants to play more soccer. He might move to a team called Sunderland. He did not play much for Manchester City because of injuries. Sunderland wants him to join their team soon.
simplified_secondary_school: Sunderland is trying to sign Jack Rodwell from Manchester City. The 23-year-old midfielder has played very little over the last two seasons due to injuries. He only made 26 appearances and struggled to impress his managers. Rodwell moved from Everton for twelve million pounds but now needs a fresh start. Sunderland hopes to improve their squad after staying in the Premier League. Rodwell also wants more chances to play for the England national team.

original_text: ''' is the probability distribution of the value of signal fading, relative to a specified reference level. In the case of phase interference fading, the time distribution of the instantaneous field strength usually approximates a Rayleigh distribution when several signal components of equal amplitude are present. The field strength is usually measured in volts per meter. The fading distribution may also be measured in terms of power level, where the unit of measure is usually watts per square meter and the expression is in decibels. References Radio frequency propagation fading
simplified_kindergarten: The radio signal fades away. It is like a quiet song.
simplified_primary_school: Radio signals can get weaker over time. This happens when many parts of the signal mix together. We can measure how strong the signal is. Some people use power to see how it changes.
simplified_secondary_school: Fading describes how the strength of a radio signal changes over time. When several equal signals interfere with each other, the field strength often follows a Rayleigh distribution. Scientists measure this strength in volts per meter or as power in watts. These changes are often expressed in decibels to show how the signal level shifts.

original_text: West Ham have pulled out of a loan deal for 19-year-old AC Milan striker M'Baye Niang. The striker was chased by Everton, Tottenham and Arsenal 18 months ago while at Caen. The France Under 21 international became the San Siro club’s second youngest scorer in history, but a dip in form and Milan’s disastrous season saw him shipped off to Montpellier on loan in January. VIDEO Scroll down to see what was left of Niang's Ferrari in the aftermath of the crash . Wanted: M'Baye Niang (left) is in talks with West Ham over a £250,000 loan deal from AC Milan . He returned at the end of this season having been in trouble and handed a suspended jail term for his involvement in a hit-and-run accident earlier in the year. Niang is available for a fee of around £4million. Experience: Niang's parent club AC Milan are interested in loaning the forward out once again . Trouble: Niang was handed a suspended jail term for his involvement in a hit-and-run accident earlier this year .
simplified_kindergarten: The soccer player stays home. He is not moving today.
simplified_primary_school: West Ham will not sign the young player Niang. He played in Italy and France before. Many big teams wanted him in the past. He had some trouble with his car this year.
simplified_secondary_school: West Ham decided not to complete a loan deal for AC Milan striker M'Baye Niang. Several top English clubs wanted the young French player eighteen months ago. He became a famous scorer in Italy but struggled during a difficult season. After a loan in France, he faced legal trouble for a car accident. AC Milan wants to loan him out again for a small fee.

original_text: St Helens player Louie McCarthy-Scarsbrook has been punished by the Rugby Football League for swearing in the immediate aftermath of his club's Grand-Final triumph. Sky Sports were forced to apologise to viewers after an excited McCarthy-Scarsbrook accidently let slip a swear word during a live interview just moments after he had helped his side to a surprise 14-6 win over Wigan at Old Trafford last Saturday. Louie McCarthy-Scarsbrook of St Helens lifts the Super League trophy aloft after the Grand Final victory . ouie McCarthy-Scarsbrook (centre) of St Helens celebrates his side's opening try scored by Sia Soliola . St Helens captain Paul Wellens lifts the trophy after winning the Super League Grand Final . He was on Thursday fined £250 after being found guilty of misconduct, although the fine is suspended until the end of next season. An RFL spokesman said: 'McCarthy-Scarsbrook was deemed to be in breach of operational rule D1.8(c) and the RFL's Respect policy.' St Helens coach Nathan Brown and Paul Wellens lift the trophy after winning the Super League Grand Final . Sia Soliola celebrates in front of Saints fans after making his final appearance for the club .
simplified_kindergarten: The player said a bad word. He must pay some money.
simplified_primary_school: A rugby player named Louie said a bad word on TV. He was very excited because his team won the big game. Now he has to pay a fine because he broke the rules.
simplified_secondary_school: Louie McCarthy-Scarsbrook was fined £250 for swearing during a live television interview. This happened right after his team, St Helens, won the Grand Final. Sky Sports had to apologize to viewers for the accidental bad language. The Rugby Football League said he broke their respect policy and rules. However, his fine is suspended until the end of next season.

original_text: (CNN) -- Three people were killed and dozens were injured in a massive pileup on a highway in Virginia on Sunday, police said. A total of 95 vehicles were involved in 17 "chain-reaction" crashes in the southbound lanes of Interstate 77, Virginia State Police spokeswoman Corinne Geller said. Twenty-five people were transported to hospitals for treatment, she said. The first calls to 911 came in at around 1:15 p.m. as fog engulfed the highway. Video from CNN affiliate WSLS showed traffic completely stopped as emergency personnel worked around burnt vehicles. Smoke rose from one, drifting up into the low clouds. The pileup occurred near the Virginia-North Carolina border. Read more about this story from CNN affiliate WSLS.
simplified_kindergarten: Many cars crashed on a road. It was very foggy.
simplified_primary_school: Many cars crashed on a big road in Virginia. Three people died and many others were hurt. It was very foggy and hard to see. Firefighters came to help the people in the cars.
simplified_secondary_school: Three people died and many others were injured during a massive pileup in Virginia on Sunday. Police reported that 95 vehicles were involved in several crashes on the highway. Thick fog covered the road and made driving very dangerous for everyone. Emergency workers arrived to help twenty-five people who needed to go to the hospital. Video footage showed smoke rising from burnt cars near the North Carolina border.

original_text: (CNN) -- Italian fashion designers Domenico Dolce and Stefano Gabbana lost the appeal of their jail sentence for tax convictions in Italy, their lawyer said Wednesday. The men were sentenced to 18 months in prison by a lower court after being found guilty of failing to pay 40 million euros in taxes owed to the Italian government last year. They must also pay a 500,000 euro fine. The case will now be appealed to Italy's Supreme Court of Cassation, attorney Armando Simbari told CNN. The Dolce & Gabbana label is a popular brand on luxury clothing and accessories. CNN's Livia Borghese in Rome contributed to this report.
simplified_kindergarten: Two men did something bad. They must go to jail.
simplified_primary_school: Two famous clothes designers must go to jail. They did not pay their taxes to the government. They also have to pay a big fine. Their lawyer will try to help them again soon.
simplified_secondary_school: Italian fashion designers Dolce and Gabbana lost an appeal regarding their prison sentence for tax evasion. A court previously found them guilty of failing to pay millions in taxes. They were sentenced to 18 months in jail and must pay a large fine. Their lawyer plans to take the case to Italy's highest court next. The Dolce & Gabbana brand is famous worldwide for luxury clothing and expensive accessories.

This method is successful and can be used for many other types of atoms in future experiments.

original_text: (CNN) -- Tropical Storm Raymond strengthened into a hurricane Sunday off Mexico's Pacific Coast, threatening to dump heavy rains. A hurricane watch and tropical storm warning were in effect from Acapulco to Tecpan de Galeana, according to the National Hurricane Center. A hurricane warning was issued for Tecpan de Galeana to Lazaro Cardenas. As of Sunday night, Raymond was 155 miles west-southwest of Acapulco. It had maximum sustained winds of 100 mph, with higher gusts, and was moving north at 6 mph. Raymond strengthened rapidly and was expected to continue to strengthen. The storm is forecast to near the coast within the hurricane warning area late Monday or Tuesday. It is predicted it will take a sharp turn west before it has a chance to reach land, the hurricane center said. Raymond is forecast to dump heavy rain along the south-central coast of Mexico, with between 2 to 4 inches and up to 8 over the state of Guerrero. The area was hit hard by another storm in September. The previous storm, Manuel, triggered deadly mudslides and left about 40,000 tourists stranded in Acapulco, a popular tourist destination.
simplified_kindergarten: A big storm is coming. It brings lots of rain.
simplified_primary_school: A big storm named Raymond is near Mexico. It has very strong winds and heavy rain. People must stay safe because the rain causes floods. The storm will move near the coast on Monday.
simplified_secondary_school: Hurricane Raymond is strengthening off the coast of Mexico and moving slowly toward the north. The storm has winds of 100 mph and is expected to bring heavy rain to the region. Officials have issued warnings for several coastal cities, including Acapulco. Experts believe the hurricane will turn west before it actually hits the land. This area is still recovering from a deadly storm that happened in September. That previous storm caused mudslides and trapped many tourists in the city.
